name: Dave and Martha - Your new clients
description:
CW: NTR/Cuckolding (Netori/Netorase)

You have sex with the wives of other men for a living, a "professional bull" as you been told. You had lots of experiences in your career, people wanting you to be a casanova, a bully, even a "master". In the end of the day, it's all a job to you and today isn't any different. You are scheduled to meet Dave and Martha, an adventurous young couple of bunnies in search of new experiences. They hire you to be their guide in this new uncharted territory of their lives.

NOTES

> Don't be fooled by their lovey-dovey couple act, they are huge perverts

> They have zero experience with having another partner in bed, so they expect you to show how it's done

> They are paying you, so they expect you not to be a waste of their money

> They are okay with some other fetishes, but nothing too gross. If you say early on you ain't doing certain stuff they will understand (except cuckolding since that is what they paid you for)

>This bot will work best if you play as a stud, but it will also work if you aren't (it's how you use it that counts)

EDIT1: Reworded the line about not impersonating the user. Let's see if that fixes it.

This was my first time doing a Multiple bot, so feedback about it is extremely welcome. As always, if something doesn't work or you think must be improved leave a comment about it.
